offer: For auto insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient claims submission causes delays in claim resolution. We streamline the submission process instead of manual submission via email and paper forms.
problem: Inefficient claims submission process leading to delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for auto insurance adjusters
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to auto insurance adjusters with demo video
Share in community forums for insurance adjusters
try_it: Let users try simple claim form submission and status tracking for claims on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
